name: Belpointe PREP, LLC
summary: PART I . In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (this Form 10-K), unless context otherwise requires, references to we, us, our, Belpointe or the Company refer to Belpointe PREP, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, its operating companies, Belpointe PREP OC, LLC, a Delaware limited company, and Belpointe PREP TN OC, LLC, a Delaware limited company (each an Operating Company and, together, the Operating Companies), and each of the Operating Companies subsidiaries, taken together.
